reviews.name: 사****
reviews.content: 완전 취저 인가봐요 진짜 좋아하고 잘 놀아요! 진작사줄걸.,..
reviews.content_en: It seems to be her total favorite! She really loves it and plays with it so well! I wish I had bought it sooner...

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
무아는 어릴때부터 멈머손 러버였어요! 바스락 소리만 나면
귀를 쫑긋!ㅋㅋ
이번에는 4번째 멈머손입니다ㅋㅋㅋ 
멈머손으로 이제는 쓰다듬어주기까지 하네요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Mua has been a crinkle toy fan since she was little! The moment she hears that rustling sound, her ears perk right up! ㅋㅋ This is already her 4th crinkle toy ㅋㅋㅋ Now she even lets us pet her with the crinkle toy ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 바스락거리는 장난감 엄청 좋아해서 반응이 좋겠지 하고 시키긴 했는데 너무 좋아해요 촉감도 부들부들해서 느낌도 좋구 애기가 너무 맘에들어해서 좋네용 다음에 삑삑이도 구매해야겠어요
reviews.content_en: I got it hoping she'd react well since she loves crinkly toys, but she loves it SO much! The texture is so soft and nice to touch, and my baby absolutely adores it so I'm happy~ I need to get the squeaky one next!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 삑삑 바스락 둘 중 뭘 더 좋아할까 궁금해서 둘다 시켜봤는데 둘다 너무 좋아하네요 ^^ 그리고 장갑안에 미니 트릿이나 사료 한알 넣어서 주면 알아서 꺼내먹고 엄청 좋아해요 ! 패키징도 너무 귀여워서 만족합니당
reviews.content_en: I was curious which she'd like more between squeaky and crinkly so I got both, and she loves them both!! ^^ And if I put a mini treat or a piece of kibble inside the glove, she figures it out and eats it—she loves it so much! Plus the packaging is super cute so I'm very satisfied 😊

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
목요일 오전에 결제했는데 다음날이 공휴일이었는데도 이틀 뒤 토요일에 배송 받았습니다~
저희 강쥐가 삑삑이를 너무 좋아해서 바스락 말고 삑삑이만 구매했습니다
예상대로 너무 너무 좋아해서 뿌듯하네요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I paid on Thursday morning, and even though the next day was a holiday, I received it on Saturday two days later~ Our pup loves the squeaky so much that I only bought the squeaky instead of the crinkly one. She loves it exactly as expected, so I'm really proud! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
아기들이 놀기에 너무 크지 않아요 
바스락 삑삑 둘 다 좋아하네요 
바잇미라벨을 제거하기 쉽게 만들어 주면 좋을것 같아요 
보들보들 해서 같이 놀아주기도 괜찮아요 
밑에 뚫려있는곳의 용도는 잘 모르겠어요
reviews.content_en: They're not too big for the babies to play with. She likes both the crinkly and squeaky! It would be nice if the BITE ME label were easier to remove. The soft texture makes it nice to play with them too. I'm not sure what the hole at the bottom is for though.

reviews.name: 연****
reviews.content: 크기적당하네요~~~ 저희 애기는 11개월인데 애기때부터 삑삑이도 좋아하지만 부스럭을 넘 넘 좋아해요~~~ 그동안 강아지용 부스럭인형이 잘없어서 고양이용 많이 사줬었는뎅 바잇미 알게된지 얼마 안됐는데 요기는 인형들이 삑삑이랑 바스락이 같이있어서 넘좋아요~~~가격이 살짝 있긴하지만 유기견도 도와주신다고하니 더좋은것같아요~~ 고무장갑 장난감소독기 소독후 꺼내주니 부스럭만 가지구놀아요~~~ 삑삑이는 장갑크기에 비해 좀 작은감이 있어요~~ 담번 다른거 주문때 부스럭장갑 하나 더 구매해서 엄마집에도 갖다두려구용ㅎㅎㅎ 잠도안자고 배까고 누워서 부시럭대는데 넘귀여워오~~ 울애기 장난감 많이 사주려면 돈 마니벌어야딩!!!
reviews.content_en: The size is just right~~~ Our baby is 11 months old and loves the squeaky since she was little, but she REALLY REALLY loves the crinkle sound~~~ We haven't found many crinkle toys for dogs so we bought a lot of cat toys, but it hasn't been long since I discovered BITE ME and their toys have both squeaky and crinkle together so I love it~~~ The price is a bit high but since they help rescue dogs it feels even better~~ After sanitizing with a rubber glove toy sanitizer, I take it out and she plays with just the crinkle~~~ The squeaky seems a bit small compared to the glove size~~ Next time I order I'm planning to buy one more crinkle glove to keep at my mom's place ㅎㅎㅎ She doesn't even sleep, just lies there with her belly out rustling it, it's SO cute~~ To buy my baby lots of toys I gotta make lots of money!!!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
기존에 갖고 있던 타사제품 바스락인형은 던져줘도 거들떠 보지도 않고 멈머손에 환장하고 있습니다. 
사진에서 인형을 빼앗기지 않겠다는 격렬함이 느껴지시죠...ㅎㅎㅎㅎ 
멈머손의 바스락소리가 더 경쾌하다고 해야하나? 자잘하게 바사사사삭 하고 소리가 나니 강아지가 정말 너무 좋아하고요. 바잇미 제품들 디자인이 귀여워서 아띠가 갖고 노니 너무 앙증맞고 귀여워요. 조만간 다른 제품들 또 주문하려고요. 
빠른 배송과 귀여운 간식도 감사합니다!
reviews.content_en: She completely ignores the crinkle toy from another brand that she had before, but she's absolutely crazy about the crinkle hand! You can feel the intensity in the photo—she won't let go of the toy... ㅎㅎㅎㅎ The crinkle sound of the crinkle hand is more crisp? It makes these little crunchy crinkle sounds and my pup absolutely loves it. The BITE ME products have such cute designs that when my friend plays with it, it looks so adorable and precious. I'm planning to order other products soon. Thank you for the fast shipping and cute treats!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
울탄이 애기때도 선물받아서 최애 장난감이였는데 
잘가지고놀다 사망해서 요번에 새로 구매했어요 미세먼지때문에 산책 잘못해서 사준건데 여전히 잘가지고놀아요 감사해여ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My Tan received this as a gift when she was a baby and it was her favorite toy, but it eventually broke so I bought a new one this time. I got it for her since we weren't able to go for walks much because of fine dust, but she still plays with it well. Thank you! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아해요 ㅠㅜ 매번 다이소 장난감만 사주다가 이번에 생일이라 많이 주문해봤는데 국내제작 상품이라 안심하고 줄수있을거같아요 강아지들 애착인형으로 딱입니다 사이즈도 딱 좋구 ㅎㅎㅎ 소형견도 충분히 가지고 놀만큼 귀엽고 이뻐요!!
reviews.content_en: I love it so much ㅠㅜ I used to only buy toys from Daiso, but since it's her birthday I ordered a lot this time. Since it's domestically made I feel comfortable giving it to her. It's perfect as an attachment toy for dogs! The size is just perfect too ㅎㅎㅎ Even small dogs can play with it enough—it's so cute and pretty!!

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 엄청 좋아해요 ㅎㅎ 진짜 포장 고무장갑 같구요! 하나는 삑삑이 하나는 바스락인데 바스락을 더 좋아하네용
reviews.content_en: She absolutely loves it!! ㅎㅎ The packaging feels just like a rubber glove! One has a squeaker and one has a crinkle sound, but she prefers the crinkle one~

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 흐늘흐늘하고 소리 짱짱하게 잘 나요! 디자인도 너무 귀엽습니다ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's super stretchy and makes a great crunchy sound! The design is adorable too ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 비닐소리를 평소에 좋아해줘서 샀는데 가져가기만 해도 입에 물고 갑니다 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 너무 좋아해요 원출원 완전싸게 득템했네요
reviews.content_en: My dog normally loves plastic/crinkle sounds, so I bought this and she just picks it up and carries it in her mouth ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ She loves it so much! I got such a great deal on it~

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 너무너무 귀여워여 이렇게 통통한 재질인지 몰랐는데 재질이 너무 좋와요~ 저희애기들 보면 난리나겠어여^^
reviews.content_en: It's so so cute!! 😍 I didn't know it would be this squishy, but the material is amazing~ My babies are going to go crazy over it^^

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 뽀시락 소리가 과자나 간식봉지랑 비슷하여 강아지가 취향에 맞나봅니다 엄청 좋아하면서 잘 가지고 놉니다 물어뜯어도 튼튼한 편입니다
reviews.content_en: The crinkle sound is similar to snack bags, so it seems like my dog loves it! She absolutely adores it and carries it around well. It's pretty durable even with chewing.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
삑삑이는 정말 별로입니다 한두 번 물면 삑소리내는 장치가 그냥 쑥 빠져서 폭폭 바람 빠지는 소리만 납니다

그래도 바스락이 한 건 해주네요
정말 정신 나갈 거 같은 바스락 입니다 제가 여지껏 장난감 사면서 봤던 바스락 중에서 당연
최고봉~ 장난감 디자인도 손으로 생겨서 터그놀아 해주기도 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The squeaker honestly isn't great. After just one or two bites, the squeaking device just pops right out and all you hear is the air deflating. But the crinkle one is definitely worth it! It's seriously the best crinkle toy I've ever bought. Plus the toy design has a hand shape which is great for tug games with your dog~

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 포장이넘귀엽네요~ 큰강아지한테준건며칠만에뜯어졌지만^^;
reviews.content_en: The packaging is so adorable~ 😍 My big dog destroyed it in just a few days though ^^;

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 사실 명절에 본가에 갔다가 요 바스락 제품이 있길래 갖고 노라고 줬는데 울집 강지가 너무 탐내하길래 집내려와서 하나 장만해주고 싶었어요 역시나 인형이 도착하니 신나서 흔들어 제끼고 던지고 놀고 난리났네욬ㅋㅋㅋ삑삑이가 너무 과하게 소리가 거슬리신 분들은 바스락제품이 훨 나아요 바스락 사세용~~
reviews.content_en: So I actually visited my parents' place during the holidays and saw this crinkle product there, so I let my dog play with it. My pup loved it so much that I wanted to get one for home. Sure enough, when the toy arrived, he got so excited shaking it, throwing it, playing with it—total chaos ㅋㅋㅋ If the squeaker sound is too annoying for you, the crinkle version is definitely better! Go for the crinkle~~

reviews.name: 곽****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요!!! 무겁지 않고 바스락 소리도 나서 그런지 잘 물고 다니면서 잘 가지고 놀아요!!!
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable!!! It's not heavy and makes a crinkle sound, so my dog loves carrying it around and playing with it!!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 바잇미 첫구매하고 다시 재구매했는데 아이가 너무 좋아하고 잘 가지고 놀아요 특히 멈머손을 제일 좋아해요 ㅜㅜ 싸게 이벤트할때 잘 구매했어요 ㅎㅎㅎ 간사핮니다 또 장난감 망가지면 다시 사러올께여
reviews.content_en: This was my first BITE ME purchase and I repurchased it because my dog loves it so much and plays with it constantly! She especially loves the hand toy ㅜㅜ I was smart to buy it during the sales events~ Thank you so much! When the toy breaks, I'll come back to buy more~

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 와 진짜 너무 귀여워요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 삑삑/바스락 하나씩 주문했는데 배송도 빠르고 포장지도 너무 귀엽고 ㅠㅠ,, 만두 갖고놀라고 주문한건데 제가 자꾸 보게 돼요 ㅠㅠㅠ 익살스런 표정 ㅠㅠ 저희 만두는 삑삑이보다 바스락을 더 좋아하는것 같습니당ㅎㅎ 원래 리뷰 잘 안쓰는데 너무 만족스러워서 남깁니다^_^!! 입이 작은 댕댕이들에겐 멈머손이 딱인 듯 합니다!!
reviews.content_en: Omg it's so cute lol😭 I ordered both the squeaky and crinkly versions and the shipping was fast, plus the packaging is adorable 😭😭 I got it for Mandu to play with but I keep looking at it myself 😭😭 that silly expression 😭 Our Mandu seems to prefer the crinkly one more than the squeaky one hehe 😊 I usually don't write reviews but I'm so satisfied I had to leave one^_^!! It seems like MAMAW HAND is perfect for doggies with small mouths!!

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
아이가 넘나 좋아하는
멈머손~^^
reviews.content_en: My baby loves it so much~ ^^

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 잘가지고 놀지는 않지만 ,, 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: She doesn't really play with it much,, but it's so cute

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 삑삑이 좋아해서 주문해줬어요 확실히 튼튼하구 넘 잘가지구 놀아요
reviews.content_en: She loved the squeaky toy so I ordered it for her. It's definitely sturdy and she plays with it really well

reviews.name: 소****
reviews.content: 너무 조아해요 ㅋ 삑삑이를 더 조아함
reviews.content_en: I love it so much lol, she likes the squeaky one even more

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 우리 토리랑 제리가 넘 좋와해요..
reviews.content_en: My Tory and Jerry love it so much..

reviews.name: 차****
reviews.content: 강쥐가 좋아햐용~!~!!
reviews.content_en: The tough pup loves it~!~!!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
지난번에 샀는데  울 애기가 넘 좋아해서
세일도 해서 하나 더 구매했어요
바스락 소리가 다른 장난감보다 찐으로 커요
겁 없는 애기들은 진짜 좋아할거에요
reviews.content_en: I bought it last time and my baby loved it so much that I bought another one when it went on sale. The crinkly sound is genuinely louder than other toys. Dogs with no fear will absolutely love it

reviews.name: j****
reviews.content: 활발한 저희 고양이를 위해서 멈마장난감을 사보았는데요 결과는 대성공ㅋㅋㅋㅇ 비닐을 워낙 좋아해서 바스락으로 샀고 진짜 미쳐요 동영상이 안올라가는게 넘 아쉬울뿐ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ  비닐워낙 좋아하는데 이식증때문에 평소 장난감도 못꺼내놨었는데 바잇미는 멈머용이라 튼튼해서 밖에내놔도 안심돼요. 물론 엄청 물어뜯어서ㅋㅋㅋ항상 체크해요 안에 트릿 넣어주니까 물어뜯고 던지면서 잘꺼내먹어요ㅋㅋㅋ 트릿없어도 소리땜에 넘 환장해요 집비울때 이불이나 터널사이에 넣어두면 혼자 잘놀아요ㅠㅠ기쁨 진짜최고의장난감 인정합니다 가격은 비싸지만...우리 고앵이위해 넘 잘샀다생각해요  활발냥이들 위해서 이렇게 무게가볍게해서 🔥바스락바스락+캣닢🔥 인형도 나왔음 좋겠어요🙏 진심으로 출시기다립니다!!
reviews.content_en: I got this MAMAW toy for my active cat and it was a total success lol 😂 She loves plastic so much so I got the crinkly version and she goes crazy for it. It's such a shame I can't upload videos 😭😭😭😭 She loves plastic bags so much but because of her pica I couldn't leave regular toys out, but BITE ME MAMAW is so durable that I feel safe leaving it out. Of course she chews it up hard lol so I always check on it. When I put treats inside, she chews it and tosses it around to get them out lol 😂 Even without treats she's obsessed with the sound. When I'm leaving the house I put it between blankets or in a tunnel and she plays with it by herself 😭 Honestly it's the best toy ever. The price is pricey but... I really think it was a great purchase for my kitty 💕 For active cats, I love that it's lightweight like this 🔥Crinkle crinkle + cat nip🔥 I hope they come out with a plush version too 🙏 I'm seriously looking forward to new releases!!

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 바스락 장난감 좋아해서 구입했는데 역시나 너무 좋아하고 잘 가지고 놀아여 ㅎㅎ! 다음엔 삑삑이도 구매하려구요
reviews.content_en: I got the crinkly toy because she loved it and as expected she loves it so much and plays with it all the time hehe! Next time I'm planning to buy the squeaky version too

reviews.name: 선****
reviews.content: 우리 멍멍이가 좋아할 것 같아서샀는데 역시나 엄청 좋아합니다 한참 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: I bought this thinking my pup would like it, and sure enough, he absolutely loves it! He plays with it for hours 😊

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 바스락 소리가 크고 강해서 더 좋아하는거 같고 냄새가 안나서 깨끗한 느낌이에요~~
reviews.content_en: The crinkly sound is loud and strong, which he seems to love even more, and it doesn't have any smell so it feels clean~~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
삑삑이 봉제 인형이 최애인 우리 강아지
특히나 바잇미 장난감을 제일 애정해요
모양도 귀여운 장난감
reviews.content_en: My pup's absolute favorite is the squeaky plush toy 🐕 She especially loves the BITE ME toys 💕 The design is really cute too!

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content:
울 강쥐 최애 바스락 장난감♥️
파괴왕 강쥐 땜에 하나 더 구매했습니다 ㅎㅎ
아주 조아하네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Our pup's favorite crinkly toy ♥️ Our little destroyer went through one so fast I had to buy another one 😂 He absolutely loves it ^^

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 바스락보단 삑삑이에 환장하는데 애기가 너무 잘 가지고 놀아서 햄복❤ 세일할 때 사서 더 좋아요! 역시 바잇미인가...? 너무 재밌게 놀아서 아깝지 않았어요! 더 재밌는 장난감 원해요!! (바잇미 장난감만 너무 많아서 미쳐버림..)
reviews.content_en: My baby is obsessed with the squeakers more than the crinkles, and he plays with it SO much that I'm so happy ❤ Especially glad I got it on sale! Looks like BITE ME really knows what they're doing...? He has so much fun with it that it was totally worth it! Want even more fun toys!! (I have SO many BITE ME toys now I'm going crazy..)

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 장난감들이 다 특성이 있고 개성넘쳐서 좋아요. 저희 강아지가 너무 좋아하고 잘 물어뜯고 놀아요.
reviews.content_en: All the toys have their own unique characteristics and personality, and my pup loves them! He bites and plays with them so much.

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content:
원플원이라 친구도 하나 선물로 줬어용🌷
바시락 바시락 최공💗💗
reviews.content_en: It's a one-plus-one deal so I gave one to a friend as a gift too 🌷 The crinkle crinkle sound is the best ❤️❤️

reviews.content: 전에도 사줫는데 너무 잘가지고 놀아요 다시 새것으로 교체할겸 사줫어요 여전히 잘가지고놀아요
reviews.content_en: I got him one before and he plays with it so well, so I bought a new one to replace the old one. He still plays with it constantly!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
평소에 관심 있었는데 비싸서 못샀어요 ㅠ
이번 기회에 저렴하게 살수 있어서 너무 좋네요!
reviews.content_en: I was interested before but couldn't afford it ㅠ I'm so happy I could get it at a lower price this time!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 20% 할인해서 주문했어요. 바스락 소리 잘 나서 강아지가 좋아해요.
reviews.content_en: I ordered it with a 20% discount. The crinkly sound is great and my pup loves it.

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
2살 푸들 아가가 환장하고 갖고 놀아요
바스락 소리 짱짱하네요
완죤 대박이에용~~!!
reviews.content_en: My 2-year-old poodle is absolutely obsessed with it! 🐩 The crinkly sound is super loud and satisfying. Totally amazing~~!!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 패키지가 너무 귀여워요!   삑삑이도 커서 소리도 잘 나고, 바스락 바스락 소리도 잘 나서 멍멍이가 좋아해욤. 근데 장난감이 너무 좋았는지 뜯어준지 30분도 안되어서 다 찢어놔서 맴찢????  상품에 굉장히 만족합니다????
reviews.content_en: The packaging is so cute! The squeaker is nice and loud, and the crinkly sounds are great too—my pup loves it. But she loved the toy so much that she shredded it in less than 30 minutes 😭 I'm still very satisfied with the product though 😍

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여움ㅋㅋ
바스락소리도 커서 좋네요ㅋ요즘 최애 장난감입니다ㅋ
잘갖고놀아요^^
reviews.content_en: So cute lol The crinkly sound is loud which is great lol It's my pup's favorite toy right now lol She plays with it all the time^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
애기가 엄청 좋아해요 :) 저렴이 장난감들과는 달리 봉제가 튼튼해서 안심되고, 사이즈도 적당합니다. 여러 군데 바이트 스팟이 있어서 흔들며 놀아주기에도 좋아요!
한 번 갖고놀아줬더니 맘에 들었는지 물고 여기저기 돌아다니네욬ㅋㅋㅋ 나무야 누나는 그거 관심 별루없어,, 그만 지켜도돼,,
reviews.content_en: My baby absolutely loves it :) Unlike cheap toys, the stitching is sturdy so I feel at ease, and the size is just right. There are multiple bite spots which makes it great for interactive play! Once I gave it to her, she loved it so much she's been carrying it around and chewing on it everywhere lol lol My other dog Namuya doesn't care much about it though... I can stop watching over her now lol

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 바스락과 삑삑이 너무 귀여워요. 울집강아지도 잘 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: The crinkly and squeaker sounds are so cute. My dog plays with it really well too

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바스락이랑 삑삑이ㅡ 너무 좋아하는데요? 바스락 더 좋아해요^^
reviews.content_en: The squeaker and crinkly sounds are amazing? I love them both, but my pup loves the crinkly more^^

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 세탁하려고 넣다가들켜서 그냥바로줬어요 냄새도안나고 넘좋아해요
reviews.content_en: I was about to wash it when I got caught, so I just gave it to him right away. No weird smell and he absolutely loves it!

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 완전 원하던 장난감 1+1 완전 좋아합니다
reviews.content_en: Exactly the toy I wanted! The 1+1 deal is amazing, really happy with it

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 장난감이 너무 기엽고 잘 가지고 놀아용
reviews.content_en: The toy is so adorable and my pup plays with it really well!

reviews.name: e****
reviews.content:
삑삑이랑 고민하다 바스락으로 선택.
역시 강아지는 바스락 소리를 엄청 좋아하네요^^
처음에 택배받고 바스락 소리에 간식인줄 알고 제 앞에 얌전히 앉아있는데 귀여움이ㅎㅎ
생각보다 장난감 크기는 작은듯 했지만 소형견이 가지고 놀기에 딱인듯 해요. 마미손인데 손가락이 네개ㅎㅎ 😍
reviews.content_en: Was torn between the squeaker and crinkly, but went with the crinkly. Turns out my dog really loves that crinkly sound^^ When I first got the package, he heard the crinkly sound and thought it was a treat—he just sat nicely in front of me, so cute hehe The toy is a bit smaller than expected, but it seems perfect for small dogs to play with. It's a paw toy with four little fingers hehe 😍
